analysis.reasoning: Core message: A Chinese envoy says Afghanistan’s future arrangements should be broadly representative. This frames China as advocating inclusive governance in Afghanistan. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not referenced; no critique of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes—portrays China as supporting a just, inclusive political process in another country, consistent with cooperative, peace-oriented positioning. CH3 (epic history): Not relevant. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestic): Not about China’s domestic system. CH5 (CCP government succeeds): No claims of domestic success or leadership performance. CH6 (culture/nature): Not relevant. Conclusion: Only CH2 is promoted.
